description: Strategically important hosts for agent research — tracked in wildcard audits; NOT merge-blocking golden-hosts (yet). Product goal: honest extract or honest failure on URLs agents actually use.

status_legend.blocked_env: http_403 / network policy in audit 2026-06-15 — may work on other networks
status_legend.partial: probe or appendix OK; MCP transcode not agent-ready (2026-06-15 post-VPN social audit)
status_legend.works: MCP transcode agent-ready on documented backend path (social audit run #2)
status_legend.needs_playbook: requires seed + consent/session for acceptable fidelity

hosts.direct_permalink_note: post-v0.8 audit: browser WORKS on live 1tlh5aj permalink — full rules-announcement MD (anti-bot URL params OK). Prior runs: captcha_or_challenge or http_403. workers_unavailable fixed (heap 512MB).
hosts.agent_expectation: WORKS via browser on permalink when anti-bot clears; listing harder; P2-7 seed shipped

hosts.direct_permalink_note: run #2 + re-spot 2026-06-15 VPN-off: http_then_browser WORKS. Finland VPN 2026-06-15: http_403 CF (__cf_chl_rt_tk) standalone + D3 batch — VPN_REGRESSION on datacenter IP.
hosts.agent_expectation: WORKS via http_then_browser on local IP; avoid VPN datacenter exits for CF hosts; digest batch flaky

hosts.direct_permalink_note: README/blob URLs work on HTTP extract in audit; probe may warn challenge.

product_note: Golden-hosts (7) prove doc-site quality on merge gates. Popular-hosts priority tracks where real agents go next — reddit/SO/news are as important strategically even when L0 returns FAIL_HONEST today. Next audit: daily-digest wildcard (corpora/quality-audit-wildcard-digest.jsonl).
